title: Warm Weekend Ahead, Hot Week to Follow
summary: A mild weekend with highs in the mid-80s is expected, but the dry spell continues, increasing fire danger.
charlotte_impact: Residents should be aware of the increasing fire risk due to the ongoing dry conditions.

title: Woman Sentenced in Deadly DWI Crash
summary: Maria Leonard received a prison sentence for a DWI crash on I-77 in May 2025 that resulted in a fatality.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the severe consequences of drunk driving and the importance of road safety.

title: Community Remembers Missing Teen on Birthday
summary: The Cornelius community commemorates Madalina Cojocari's 15th birthday as the investigation into her 2022 disappearance continues.
charlotte_impact: Keeps the case in the public eye and encourages continued efforts to find Madalina.

title: Shooting Injures One in Northwest Charlotte
summary: One person was seriously injured in a shooting on Brookshire Boulevard near Interstate 85 on Friday afternoon.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about public safety and the prevalence of gun violence in the area.

title: Hornets' Playoff Return Boosts Local Economy
summary: Local businesses in Charlotte are experiencing increased sales due to the Hornets' return to the playoffs.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates the positive economic impact of sports and entertainment on the local community.

title: Road Closure Frustrates Uptown Businesses
summary: The closure of South Cedar Street near Uptown Charlotte is causing frustration for businesses and locals due to lengthy construction.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the challenges of infrastructure projects and their impact on local businesses and residents.

title: DHS Threatens to Pull Customs from 'Sanctuary City' Airports
summary: The DHS Secretary suggested removing customs officials from airports in sanctuary cities, potentially impacting international air travel.
charlotte_impact: Could significantly disrupt international travel and commerce in affected cities, including Charlotte.

title: Abandoned Puppies Reunited with Mother
summary: Eight puppies found abandoned in Gaston County have been reunited with their mother, and a suspect is facing charges.
charlotte_impact: A heartwarming story about animal welfare and the importance of responsible pet ownership.

title: Fatal Shooting in Kannapolis
summary: A man faces a voluntary manslaughter charge following a fatal shooting on Sears Street in Kannapolis.
charlotte_impact: Contributes to concerns about gun violence and public safety in the region.

title: Man Dies in Caldwell County House Fire
summary: A man was found dead in his basement after a house fire in Caldwell County on Thursday.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of house fires and the importance of fire safety measures.

title: Inmates Charged with Attempted Murder in Jail Attack
summary: Two Gaston County Jail inmates face charges for using a bottle cap to attack another inmate after escaping their cell.
charlotte_impact: Raises serious concerns about jail security and inmate safety.

title: Missing Gastonia Teen Found Safe
summary: A 16-year-old who went missing from Gastonia over 5 months ago has been found safe in North Florida.
charlotte_impact: Provides relief and hope, demonstrating the effectiveness of search efforts and community support.

title: Church Treasurer Accused of $80,000 Embezzlement
summary: A church treasurer is accused of stealing $80,000 from a Baptist church in Lincoln County between June 2025 and February 2026.
charlotte_impact: Undermines trust in religious institutions and highlights the importance of financial oversight.

title: Concord Seeks Grant for Public Housing Security
summary: Concord is applying for a $250K HUD grant to install security cameras in public housing communities due to safety concerns.
charlotte_impact: Addresses safety concerns in public housing and aims to improve residents' quality of life.

title: Shooting Injures One in Northeast Charlotte
summary: One person was injured in a shooting on McCullough Drive near North Tryon Street in northeast Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Adds to concerns about gun violence and public safety in Charlotte neighborhoods.
